periods.name: Today
periods.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after noon. Partly sunny. High near 88, with temperatures falling to around 85 in the afternoon. Southwest wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.
